nodes.name: Daily Nightly Build
nodes.summary: Main CI pipeline that checks out ArchiveTune source, patches version/package names for nightly, builds signed APKs across 6 architecture variants (arm64, armeabi, x86, x86_64, mobile universal, TV universal), uploads artifacts, and creates a GitHub release with changelog.

nodes.name: Check for Updates
nodes.summary: Checks the upstream koiverse/ArchiveTune dev branch for new commits in the last 24 hours. If commits exist, triggers the nightly build via repository dispatch.

nodes.name: Trigger Workflows
nodes.summary: Simple workflow_dispatch entry point triggered by an external cron service (cron-job.org) to avoid GitHub Actions scheduling delays.

nodes.name: Sync README
nodes.summary: Syncs README from temp/README.md template, fetches upstream README/CONTRIBUTING from koiverse/ArchiveTune, updates version counter GIFs, and pushes changes to main.

nodes.name: Update Release Notes
nodes.summary: Generates changelog via GitHub API and Kotlin script, optionally summarizes with Gemini AI, then edits the GitHub release notes with categorized formatting.

nodes.name: Discord Notification
nodes.summary: Sends a Discord webhook notification when a new nightly release is published, including version title, release link, and optional role mention.

nodes.name: Build Failure Report
nodes.summary: Issue template for automated nightly build failure reports, capturing build run ID, failed ABI(s), build date, logs, and summary.

nodes.name: Report Broken Version
nodes.summary: Issue template for users to report a broken nightly version, with pre-submission checklist, version field, what happened, steps to reproduce, and OS info.

nodes.name: Issue Template Config
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template configuration that disables blank issues, forcing users to use the provided templates.

nodes.name: Renovate Config
nodes.summary: Renovate dependency bot configuration using the recommended preset for automated dependency updates.

nodes.name: Environment Variables Example
nodes.summary: Example environment variables for Telegram notification script, including bot token, chat ID, Telegram API credentials, and GitHub repository settings.

nodes.name: check-action-versions.main.kts
nodes.summary: Kotlin script that checks GitHub Action versions used in workflow files for outdated references.

nodes.name: generate-changelog.main.kts
nodes.summary: Kotlin script that fetches commits from GitHub API for koiverse/ArchiveTune dev branch and formats a changelog with MVP committer leaderboard.

nodes.name: sync-readme.main.kts
nodes.summary: Kotlin script that copies temp/README.md template and fetches upstream README/CONTRIBUTING content from koiverse/ArchiveTune repositories.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Main project README with badges, build status, installation links, and documentation for the ArchiveTune Nightly CI/CD repository.

nodes.name: SECURITY.md
nodes.summary: Security policy document with supported versions and vulnerability reporting instructions.

nodes.name: temp/README.md
nodes.summary: README template with placeholders <!-- README.md --> and <!-- CONTRIBUTING.md --> that get replaced with upstream content during the sync workflow.

layers.name: CI/CD Pipelines
layers.description: GitHub Actions workflow files that orchestrate the nightly build process: triggering, building, syncing documentation, updating release notes, and sending notifications.

layers.name: Issue Templates
layers.description: GitHub issue templates for reporting build failures and broken nightly versions, plus configuration to enforce template usage.

layers.name: Automation Scripts
layers.description: Kotlin scripts that perform build-time tasks: syncing README content, generating changelogs, and checking GitHub Action versions.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Project configuration files including Renovate dependency bot settings and environment variable examples.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation including the main README, security policy, and README template used for syncing.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand the project's purpose as a CI/CD infrastructure repository for nightly builds of the ArchiveTune Android app.

tour.title: Build Pipeline Entry Point
tour.description: The Trigger Workflow is the cron-based entry point that initiates the nightly build process via an external scheduler, avoiding GitHub Actions scheduling delays.

tour.title: Update Check Logic
tour.description: Before building, this workflow checks the upstream ArchiveTune dev branch for new commits in the last 24 hours, only triggering a build if changes exist.

tour.title: Core Nightly Build Pipeline
tour.description: The main build workflow checks out ArchiveTune source, patches version names and package IDs for nightly, then builds signed APKs across 6 architecture variants (arm64, armeabi, x86, x86_64, mobile universal, TV universal) with retry logic.

tour.title: Changelog Generation Script
tour.description: This Kotlin script fetches commits from the upstream GitHub API and formats a changelog with an MVP committer leaderboard, used by the release notes workflow.

tour.title: Release Notes and AI Summarization
tour.description: After the build completes, this workflow generates detailed release notes, optionally summarizes them using Gemini AI, and edits the GitHub release.

tour.title: Discord Notification
tour.description: Sends a notification to Discord via webhook when a new nightly release is published, including version info and download link.

tour.title: README Sync
tour.description: This workflow syncs the README from a template, fetches upstream content, and updates version counter GIFs - ensuring documentation stays current.

tour.title: GitHub Action Version Checker
tour.description: A Kotlin script that validates all GitHub Action version references across workflow files to detect outdated versions.

tour.title: Issue Templates and User Feedback
tour.description: Issue templates for automated build failure reports and user-submitted broken version reports, forming the feedback loop for nightly quality.

project.name: ArchiveTune-Nightly
project.description: CI/CD infrastructure repository that automates daily nightly builds and releases for the ArchiveTune Android app.
